sEn: Prioritizing important transitions in experience replay improves learning efficiency and achieves state-of-the-art performance in DQN.
sZh: 优先回放重要经验能提高学习效率，并在DQN中达到最优性能。
absEn: Experience replay lets online reinforcement learning agents remember and reuse experiences from the past. In prior work, experience transitions were uniformly sampled from a replay memory. However, this approach simply replays transitions at the same frequency that they were originally experienced, regardless of their significance. In this paper we develop a framework for prioritizing experience, so as to replay important transitions more frequently, and therefore learn more efficiently. We use prioritized experience replay in Deep Q-Networks (DQN), a reinforcement learning algorithm that achieved human-level performance across many Atari games. DQN with prioritized experience replay achieves a new state-of-the-art, outperforming DQN with uniform replay on 41 out of 49 games.
absZh: 经验回放让在线强化学习代理能够记住并重用过去的经验。在先前的工作中，经验转换被均匀地从回放记忆中采样。然而，这种方法只是以与最初经历相同的频率重放转换，而不考虑它们的重要性。在本文中，我们开发了一个优先考虑经验的框架，以便更频繁地重放重要的转换，从而更有效地学习。我们在深度Q网络（DQN）中使用了优先经验回放，这是一种在多个Atari游戏中达到人类水平表现的强化学习算法。采用优先经验回放的DQN实现了新的最优性能，在49个游戏中的41个上优于采用均匀回放的DQN。

contrib.en: Proposes prioritized experience replay to replay important transitions more frequently, improving learning efficiency.
contrib.zh: 提出优先经验回放，更频繁地回放重要转换，提高学习效率。

contrib.en: Introduces stochastic prioritization to balance greedy prioritization and uniform sampling, ensuring diversity.
contrib.zh: 引入随机优先级，平衡贪婪优先和均匀采样，确保多样性。

contrib.en: Uses importance sampling to correct bias introduced by non-uniform sampling, with annealing schedule.
contrib.zh: 使用重要性采样纠正非均匀采样引入的偏差，并采用退火调度。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on Atari 2600 benchmark, outperforming DQN and Double DQN on 41 out of 49 games.
contrib.zh: 在Atari 2600基准测试中达到最先进性能，在49个游戏中41个优于DQN和Double DQN。

contrib.en: Demonstrates faster learning speed, with median normalized performance increasing from 48% to 106% for DQN.
contrib.zh: 展示更快的学习速度，DQN的中位数归一化性能从48%提升到106%。

contrib.en: Explores extensions to supervised learning and off-policy RL, showing broad applicability.
contrib.zh: 探索扩展到监督学习和离策略强化学习，展示广泛适用性。

limits.en: Prioritization based on TD error may be suboptimal when rewards are noisy or stochastic.
limits.zh: 基于TD误差的优先级在奖励有噪声或随机时可能次优。

limits.en: Greedy prioritization can lead to overfitting due to lack of diversity in sampled transitions.
limits.zh: 贪婪优先级因采样转换缺乏多样性可能导致过拟合。

limits.en: Importance sampling correction requires careful annealing; full correction may harm performance in non-stationary settings.
limits.zh: 重要性采样校正需要仔细退火；完全校正可能在非平稳设置中损害性能。

limits.en: Method assumes replay memory contents are fixed; does not address which experiences to store.
limits.zh: 方法假设回放内存内容固定，不解决存储哪些经验的问题。

limits.en: Hyperparameters (α, β) require tuning per domain; fixed settings may not generalize across all tasks.
limits.zh: 超参数（α, β）需要针对领域调整；固定设置可能无法泛化到所有任务。

items.en: Experience replay lets online reinforcement learning agents remember and reuse experiences from the past. In prior work, experience transitions were uniformly sampled from a replay memory. However, this approach simply replays transitions at the same frequency that they were originally experienced, regardless of their significance. In this paper we develop a framework for prioritizing experience, so as to replay important transitions more frequently, and therefore learn more efficiently. We use prioritized experience replay in Deep Q-Networks (DQN), a reinforcement learning algorithm that achieved human-level performance across many Atari games. DQN with prioritized experience replay achieves a new state-of-the-art, outperforming DQN with uniform replay on 41 out of 49 games.
items.zh: 经验回放让在线强化学习智能体能够记住并重用过去的经验。在先前的工作中，经验转换是从回放记忆中均匀采样的。然而，这种方法只是以与最初经历相同的频率回放转换，而不考虑其重要性。在本文中，我们开发了一个优先处理经验的框架，以便更频繁地回放重要的转换，从而更高效地学习。我们在深度Q网络（DQN）中使用了优先经验回放，这是一种在多个Atari游戏中达到人类水平表现的强化学习算法。采用优先经验回放的DQN实现了新的最先进水平，在49个游戏中以41个游戏的表现超越了使用均匀回放的DQN。

items.en: Online reinforcement learning (RL) agents incrementally update their parameters (of the policy, value function or model) while they observe a stream of experience. In their simplest form, they discard incoming data immediately, after a single update. Two issues with this are (a) strongly correlated updates that break the i.i.d. assumption of many popular stochastic gradient-based algorithms, and (b) the rapid forgetting of possibly rare experiences that would be useful later on.
items.zh: 在线强化学习智能体在观察经验流时逐步更新其参数（策略、价值函数或模型）。在最简单的形式中，它们在单次更新后立即丢弃传入的数据。这有两个问题：（a）强相关的更新破坏了许多流行的基于随机梯度的算法的独立同分布假设，以及（b）可能很快遗忘以后可能有用的罕见经验。

items.en: Experience replay (Lin, 1992) addresses both of these issues: with experience stored in a replay memory, it becomes possible to break the temporal correlations by mixing more and less recent experience for the updates, and rare experience will be used for more than just a single update. This was demonstrated in the Deep Q-Network (DQN) algorithm (Mnih et al., 2013; 2015), which stabilized the training of a value function, represented by a deep neural network, by using experience replay. Specifically, DQN used a large sliding window replay memory, sampled from it uniformly at random, and revisited each transition111 A transition is the atomic unit of interaction in RL, in our case a tuple of (state St−1subscript𝑆𝑡1S_{t-1}, action At−1subscript𝐴𝑡1A_{t-1}, reward Rtsubscript𝑅𝑡R_{t}, discount γtsubscript𝛾𝑡\gamma_{t}, next state Stsubscript𝑆𝑡S_{t}). We choose this for simplicity, but most of the arguments in this paper also hold for a coarser ways of chunking experience, e.g. into sequences or episodes. eight times on average. In general, experience replay can reduce the amount of experience required to learn, and replace it with more computation and more memory – which are often cheaper resources than the RL agent’s interactions with its environment.
items.zh: 经验回放（Lin, 1992）解决了这两个问题：将经验存储在回放记忆中后，可以通过混合较新和较旧的经验来打破时间相关性，并且罕见经验将不仅仅用于单次更新。这在深度Q网络（DQN）算法（Mnih等人，2013；2015）中得到了证明，该算法通过使用经验回放稳定了由深度神经网络表示的价值函数的训练。具体来说，DQN使用了一个大的滑动窗口回放记忆，从中均匀随机采样，并平均每次回放每个转换八次。通常，经验回放可以减少学习所需的经验量，并用更多的计算和更多的内存来替代——这些资源通常比RL智能体与其环境的交互更便宜。

items.en: In this paper, we investigate how prioritizing which transitions are replayed can make experience replay more efficient and effective than if all transitions are replayed uniformly. The key idea is that an RL agent can learn more effectively from some transitions than from others. Transitions may be more or less surprising, redundant, or task-relevant. Some transitions may not be immediately useful to the agent, but might become so when the agent competence increases (Schmidhuber, 1991). Experience replay liberates online learning agents from processing transitions in the exact order they are experienced. Prioritized replay further liberates agents from considering transitions with the same frequency that they are experienced.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们研究了优先回放哪些转换可以使经验回放比均匀回放所有转换更高效和有效。关键思想是，RL智能体从某些转换中学习比从其他转换中更有效。转换可能或多或少令人惊讶、冗余或与任务相关。有些转换可能对智能体不是立即有用，但当智能体能力提高时可能会变得有用（Schmidhuber, 1991）。经验回放使在线学习智能体不必按照经历的确切顺序处理转换。优先回放进一步使智能体不必以与经历相同的频率考虑转换。

items.en: In particular, we propose to more frequently replay transitions with high expected learning progress, as measured by the magnitude of their temporal-difference (TD) error. This prioritization can lead to a loss of diversity, which we alleviate with stochastic prioritization, and introduce bias, which we correct with importance sampling. Our resulting algorithms are robust and scalable, which we demonstrate on the Atari 2600 benchmark suite, where we obtain faster learning and state-of-the-art performance.
items.zh: 特别是，我们建议更频繁地回放具有高预期学习进度的转换，通过其时间差分（TD）误差的大小来衡量。这种优先化可能导致多样性的丧失，我们通过随机优先化来缓解，并引入偏差，我们通过重要性采样来纠正。我们得到的算法鲁棒且可扩展，我们在Atari 2600基准套件上进行了演示，在那里我们获得了更快的学习和最先进的性能。

items.en: Numerous neuroscience studies have identified evidence of experience replay in the hippocampus of rodents, suggesting that sequences of prior experience are replayed, either during awake resting or sleep. Sequences associated with rewards appear to be replayed more frequently (Atherton et al., 2015; Ólafsdóttir et al., 2015; Foster & Wilson, 2006). Experiences with high magnitude TD error also appear to be replayed more often (Singer & Frank, 2009; McNamara et al., 2014).
items.zh: 许多神经科学研究已经在大鼠海马体中发现了经验回放的证据，表明先前经验的序列在清醒休息或睡眠期间被回放。与奖励相关的序列似乎被更频繁地回放（Atherton等人，2015；Ólafsdóttir等人，2015；Foster & Wilson, 2006）。具有高TD误差幅度的经验似乎也被更频繁地回放（Singer & Frank, 2009；McNamara等人，2014）。

items.en: It is well-known that planning algorithms such as value iteration can be made more efficient by prioritizing updates in an appropriate order. Prioritized sweeping (Moore & Atkeson, 1993; Andre et al., 1998) selects which state to update next, prioritized according to the change in value, if that update was executed. The TD error provides one way to measure these priorities (van Seijen & Sutton, 2013). Our approach uses a similar prioritization method, but for model-free RL rather than model-based planning. Furthermore, we use a stochastic prioritization that is more robust when learning a function approximator from samples.
items.zh: 众所周知，诸如值迭代之类的规划算法可以通过按适当顺序优先更新来提高效率。优先扫描（Moore & Atkeson, 1993；Andre等人，1998）选择下一个要更新的状态，根据如果执行该更新后价值的变化进行优先排序。TD误差提供了一种衡量这些优先级的方法（van Seijen & Sutton, 2013）。我们的方法使用了类似的优先化方法，但用于无模型RL而不是基于模型的规划。此外，我们使用了一种随机优先化方法，当从样本中学习函数逼近器时更加鲁棒。

items.en: TD-errors have also been used as a prioritization mechanism for determining where to focus resources, for example when choosing where to explore (White et al., 2014) or which features to select (Geramifard et al., 2011; Sun et al., 2011).
items.zh: TD误差也被用作确定资源聚焦位置的优先化机制，例如在选择探索位置（White等人，2014）或选择特征（Geramifard等人，2011；Sun等人，2011）时。

items.en: In supervised learning, there are numerous techniques to deal with imbalanced datasets when class identities are known, including re-sampling, under-sampling and over-sampling techniques, possibly combined with ensemble methods (for a review, see Galar et al., 2012). A recent paper introduced a form of re-sampling in the context of deep RL with experience replay (Narasimhan et al., 2015); the method separates experience into two buckets, one for positive and one for negative rewards, and then picks a fixed fraction from each to replay. This is only applicable in domains that (unlike ours) have a natural notion of ‘positive/negative’ experience. Furthermore, Hinton (2007) introduced a form of non-uniform sampling based on error, with an importance sampling correction, which led to a 3x speed-up on MNIST digit classification.
items.zh: 在监督学习中，有许多技术处理已知类别身份的不平衡数据集，包括重采样、欠采样和过采样技术，可能结合集成方法（综述见Galar等人，2012）。最近的一篇论文在深度RL与经验回放的背景下引入了一种重采样形式（Narasimhan等人，2015）；该方法将经验分为两个桶，一个用于正奖励，一个用于负奖励，然后从每个桶中选取固定比例进行回放。这仅适用于（不像我们的）具有自然“正/负”经验概念的领域。此外，Hinton（2007）引入了一种基于误差的非均匀采样形式，并带有重要性采样校正，在MNIST数字分类上实现了3倍的加速。

items.en: There have been several proposed methods for playing Atari with deep reinforcement learning, including deep Q-networks (DQN) (Mnih et al., 2013; 2015; Guo et al., 2014; Stadie et al., 2015; Nair et al., 2015; Bellemare et al., 2016), and the Double DQN algorithm (van Hasselt et al., 2016), which is the current published state-of-the-art. Simultaneously with our work, an architectural innovation that separates advantages from the value function (see the co-submission by Wang et al., 2015) has also led to substantial improvements on the Atari benchmark.
items.zh: 已经提出了几种使用深度强化学习玩Atari游戏的方法，包括深度Q网络（DQN）（Mnih等人，2013；2015；Guo等人，2014；Stadie等人，2015；Nair等人，2015；Bellemare等人，2016），以及Double DQN算法（van Hasselt等人，2016），这是当前已发表的最先进技术。与我们的工作同时，一种将优势与价值函数分离的架构创新（见Wang等人，2015的共同提交）也在Atari基准测试上带来了显著改进。

items.en: Using a replay memory leads to design choices at two levels: which experiences to store, and which experiences to replay (and how to do so). This paper addresses only the latter: making the most effective use of the replay memory for learning, assuming that its contents are outside of our control (but see also Section 6).
items.zh: 使用回放记忆需要在两个层面进行设计选择：存储哪些经验，以及回放哪些经验（以及如何回放）。本文仅解决后者：假设回放记忆的内容不受我们控制，如何最有效地利用回放记忆进行学习（但另见第6节）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Left: Illustration of the ‘Blind Cliffwalk’ example domain: there are two actions, a ‘right’ and a ‘wrong’ one, and the episode is terminated whenever the agent takes the ‘wrong’ action (dashed red arrows). Taking the ‘right’ action progresses through a sequence of n𝑛n states (black arrows), at the end of which lies a final reward of 111 (green arrow); reward is 00 elsewhere. We chose a representation such that generalizing over what action is ‘right’ is not possible. Right: Median number of learning steps required to learn the value function as a function of the size of the total number of transitions in the replay memory. Note the log-log scale, which highlights the exponential speed-up from replaying with an oracle (bright blue), compared to uniform replay (black); faint lines are min/max values from 10 independent runs.
items.capZh: 图1：左图：“盲崖行走”示例领域的说明：有两个动作，一个“正确”和一个“错误”，每当智能体采取“错误”动作时，回合终止（红色虚线箭头）。采取“正确”动作会通过一系列n个状态（黑色箭头），在序列末尾有一个最终奖励1（绿色箭头）；其他地方奖励为0。我们选择了一种表示，使得无法泛化哪个动作是“正确”的。右图：学习价值函数所需的学习步骤中位数，作为回放记忆中总转换数的函数。注意对数-对数刻度，突出了使用oracle回放（亮蓝色）相比均匀回放（黑色）的指数级加速；淡线是10次独立运行的最小/最大值。

items.en: To understand the potential gains of prioritization, we introduce an artificial ‘Blind Cliffwalk’ environment (described in Figure 1, left) that exemplifies the challenge of exploration when rewards are rare. With only n𝑛n states, the environment requires an exponential number of random steps until the first non-zero reward; to be precise, the chance that a random sequence of actions will lead to the reward is 2−nsuperscript2𝑛2^{-n}. Furthermore, the most relevant transitions (from rare successes) are hidden in a mass of highly redundant failure cases (similar to a bipedal robot falling over repeatedly, before it discovers how to walk).
items.zh: 为了理解优先化的潜在收益，我们引入了一个人工的“盲崖行走”环境（图1左描述），它说明了当奖励稀少时探索的挑战。只有n个状态，该环境需要指数数量的随机步骤才能获得第一个非零奖励；确切地说，随机动作序列导致奖励的概率是2^{-n}。此外，最相关的转换（来自罕见的成功）隐藏在大量高度冗余的失败案例中（类似于双足机器人反复跌倒，然后才发现如何行走）。

items.en: We use this example to highlight the difference between the learning times of two agents. Both agents perform Q-learning updates on transitions drawn from the same replay memory. The first agent replays transitions uniformly at random, while the second agent invokes an oracle to prioritize transitions. This oracle greedily selects the transition that maximally reduces the global loss in its current state (in hindsight, after the parameter update). For the details of the setup, see Appendix B.1. Figure 1 (right) shows that picking the transitions in a good order can lead to exponential speed-ups over uniform choice. Such an oracle is of course not realistic, yet the large gap motivates our search for a practical approach that improves on uniform random replay.
items.zh: 我们使用这个例子来突出两个智能体学习时间的差异。两个智能体都对从同一回放记忆中抽取的转换执行Q学习更新。第一个智能体均匀随机地回放转换，而第二个智能体调用oracle来优先选择转换。这个oracle贪婪地选择能够最大程度减少其当前状态全局损失的转换（事后，在参数更新之后）。有关设置的详细信息，请参见附录B.1。图1（右）显示，以良好的顺序选择转换可以比均匀选择带来指数级的加速。这样的oracle当然不现实，但巨大的差距激励我们寻找一种实用的方法，以改进均匀随机回放。

items.en: The central component of prioritized replay is the criterion by which the importance of each transition is measured. One idealised criterion would be the amount the RL agent can learn from a transition in its current state (expected learning progress). While this measure is not directly accessible, a reasonable proxy is the magnitude of a transition’s TD error δ𝛿\delta, which indicates how ‘surprising’ or unexpected the transition is: specifically, how far the value is from its next-step bootstrap estimate (Andre et al., 1998). This is particularly suitable for incremental, online RL algorithms, such as SARSA or Q-learning, that already compute the TD-error and update the parameters in proportion to δ𝛿\delta. The TD-error can be a poor estimate in some circumstances as well, e.g. when rewards are noisy; see Appendix A for a discussion of alternatives.
items.zh: 优先回放的核心组件是衡量每个转换重要性的标准。一个理想化的标准是RL智能体在当前状态下可以从一个转换中学到的量（预期学习进度）。虽然这个度量不能直接获得，但一个合理的代理是转换的TD误差δ的大小，它指示转换有多“令人惊讶”或意外：具体来说，价值与其下一步自举估计之间的差距（Andre等人，1998）。这对于增量式在线RL算法（如SARSA或Q-learning）特别合适，这些算法已经计算了TD误差并按照δ的比例更新参数。在某些情况下，TD误差也可能是一个较差的估计，例如当奖励有噪声时；关于替代方案的讨论见附录A。

items.en: To demonstrate the potential effectiveness of prioritizing replay by TD error, we compare the uniform and oracle baselines in the Blind Cliffwalk to a ‘greedy TD-error prioritization’ algorithm. This algorithm stores the last encountered TD error along with each transition in the replay memory. The transition with the largest absolute TD error is replayed from the memory. A Q-learning update is applied to this transition, which updates the weights in proportion to the TD error. New transitions arrive without a known TD-error, so we put them at maximal priority in order to guarantee that all experience is seen at least once. Figure 2 (left), shows that this algorithm results in a substantial reduction in the effort required to solve the Blind Cliffwalk task.222 Note that a random (or optimistic) initialization of the Q-values is necessary with greedy prioritization. If initializing with zero instead, unrewarded transitions would appear to have zero error initially, be placed at the bottom of the queue, and not be revisited until the error on other transitions drops below numerical precision.
items.zh: 为了展示通过TD误差优先回放的有效性，我们将盲崖行走中的均匀和oracle基线比较为一种“贪婪TD误差优先化”算法。该算法将最后遇到的TD误差与回放记忆中的每个转换一起存储。从记忆中回放具有最大绝对TD误差的转换。对此转换应用Q学习更新，按TD误差的比例更新权重。新转换到达时没有已知的TD误差，因此我们将它们置于最大优先级，以确保所有经验至少被看到一次。图2（左）显示，该算法显著减少了解决盲崖行走任务所需的工作量。注意，贪婪优先化需要随机（或乐观）初始化Q值。如果初始化为零，未获得奖励的转换最初将显示零误差，被置于队列底部，并且直到其他转换的误差降至数值精度以下才会被重新访问。

items.en: Implementation: To scale to large memory sizes N𝑁N, we use a binary heap data structure for the priority queue, for which finding the maximum priority transition when sampling is O​(1)𝑂1O(1) and updating priorities (with the new TD-error after a learning step) is O​(log⁡N)𝑂𝑁O(\log N). See Appendix B.2.1 for more details.
items.zh: 实现：为了扩展到大的记忆大小N，我们使用二叉堆数据结构作为优先级队列，采样时找到最大优先级转换的时间复杂度为O(1)，更新优先级（使用学习步骤后的新TD误差）的时间复杂度为O(log N)。更多细节见附录B.2.1。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Median number of updates required for Q-learning to learn the value function on the Blind Cliffwalk example, as a function of the total number of transitions (only a single one of which was successful and saw the non-zero reward). Faint lines are min/max values from 10 random initializations. Black is uniform random replay, cyan uses the hindsight-oracle to select transitions, red and blue use prioritized replay (rank-based and proportional respectively). The results differ by multiple orders of magnitude, thus the need for a log-log plot. In both subplots it is evident that replaying experience in the right order makes an enormous difference to the number of updates required. See Appendix B.1 for details. Left: Tabular representation, greedy prioritization. Right: Linear function approximation, both variants of stochastic prioritization.
items.capZh: 图2：在盲崖行走示例上，Q学习学习价值函数所需更新的中位数，作为总转换数的函数（其中只有一个成功并看到了非零奖励）。淡线是10次随机初始化的最小/最大值。黑色是均匀随机回放，青色使用事后oracle选择转换，红色和蓝色使用优先回放（基于排名和基于比例）。结果相差多个数量级，因此需要对数-对数图。在两个子图中，很明显以正确的顺序回放经验对所需更新次数产生了巨大差异。详见附录B.1。左图：表格表示，贪婪优先化。右图：线性函数逼近，两种随机优先化变体。

items.en: However, greedy TD-error prioritization has several issues. First, to avoid expensive sweeps over the entire replay memory, TD errors are only updated for the transitions that are replayed. One consequence is that transitions that have a low TD error on first visit may not be replayed for a long time (which means effectively never with a sliding window replay memory). Further, it is sensitive to noise spikes (e.g. when rewards are stochastic), which can be exacerbated by bootstrapping, where approximation errors appear as another source of noise. Finally, greedy prioritization focuses on a small subset of the experience: errors shrink slowly, especially when using function approximation, meaning that the initially high error transitions get replayed frequently. This lack of diversity that makes the system prone to over-fitting.
items.zh: 然而，贪婪TD误差优先化有几个问题。首先，为了避免对整个回放记忆进行昂贵的扫描，TD误差仅针对被回放的转换进行更新。一个后果是，首次访问时具有低TD误差的转换可能长时间不会被回放（在滑动窗口回放记忆中意味着永远不会）。此外，它对噪声尖峰敏感（例如当奖励是随机的时），这可以通过自举加剧，其中近似误差作为另一个噪声源出现。最后，贪婪优先化集中于一小部分经验：误差缓慢缩小，特别是在使用函数逼近时，这意味着初始高误差的转换被频繁回放。这种多样性的缺乏使系统容易过拟合。

items.en: To overcome these issues, we introduce a stochastic sampling method that interpolates between pure greedy prioritization and uniform random sampling. We ensure that the probability of being sampled is monotonic in a transition’s priority, while guaranteeing a non-zero probability even for the lowest-priority transition. Concretely, we define the probability of sampling transition i𝑖i as
items.zh: 为了克服这些问题，我们引入了一种随机采样方法，在纯贪婪优先化和均匀随机采样之间插值。我们确保被采样的概率在转换的优先级上是单调的，同时保证即使是最低优先级的转换也有非零概率。具体来说，我们定义采样转换i的概率为

items.en: where pi>0subscript𝑝𝑖0p_{i}>0 is the priority of transition i𝑖i. The exponent α𝛼\alpha determines how much prioritization is used, with α=0𝛼0\alpha=0 corresponding to the uniform case.
items.zh: 其中 pi>0 是转移 i 的优先级。指数 α 决定优先化的程度，α=0 对应均匀情况。

items.en: The first variant we consider is the direct, proportional prioritization where pi=|δi|+ϵsubscript𝑝𝑖subscript𝛿𝑖italic-ϵp_{i}=|\delta_{i}|+\epsilon, where ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon is a small positive constant that prevents the edge-case of transitions not being revisited once their error is zero. The second variant is an indirect, rank-based prioritization where pi=1rank⁡(i)subscript𝑝𝑖1rank𝑖p_{i}=\frac{1}{\operatorname{rank}(i)}, where rank⁡(i)rank𝑖\operatorname{rank}(i) is the rank of transition i𝑖i when the replay memory is sorted according to |δi|subscript𝛿𝑖|\delta_{i}|. In this case, P𝑃P becomes a power-law distribution with exponent α𝛼\alpha. Both distributions are monotonic in |δ|𝛿|\delta|, but the latter is likely to be more robust, as it is insensitive to outliers. Both variants of stochastic prioritization lead to large speed-ups over the uniform baseline on the Cliffwalk task, as shown on Figure 2 (right).
items.zh: 我们考虑的第一个变体是直接的比例优先化，其中 pi=|δi|+ε，ε 是一个小的正常数，防止当转移误差为零时不再被重放。第二个变体是间接的基于排名的优先化，其中 pi=1/rank(i)，rank(i) 是转移 i 在重放内存按 |δi| 排序时的排名。在这种情况下，P 成为指数为 α 的幂律分布。两种分布都关于 |δ| 单调，但后者对异常值不敏感，因此可能更鲁棒。两种随机优先化变体在 Cliffwalk 任务上都比均匀基线带来了大幅加速，如图 2（右）所示。

items.en: Implementation: To efficiently sample from distribution (1), the complexity cannot depend on N𝑁N. For the rank-based variant, we can approximate the cumulative density function with a piecewise linear function with k𝑘k segments of equal probability. The segment boundaries can be precomputed (they change only when N𝑁N or α𝛼\alpha change). At runtime, we sample a segment, and then sample uniformly among the transitions within it. This works particularly well in conjunction with a minibatch-based learning algorithm: choose k𝑘k to be the size of the minibatch, and sample exactly one transition from each segment – this is a form of stratified sampling that has the added advantage of balancing out the minibatch (there will always be exactly one transition with high magnitude δ𝛿\delta, one with medium magnitude, etc). The proportional variant is different, also admits an efficient implementation based on a ‘sum-tree’ data structure (where every node is the sum of its children, with the priorities as the leaf nodes), which can be efficiently updated and sampled from. See Appendix B.2.1 for more additional details.
items.zh: 实现：为了高效地从分布 (1) 中采样，复杂度不能依赖于 N。对于基于排名的变体，我们可以用具有 k 个等概率分段的线性分段函数来近似累积密度函数。分段边界可以预先计算（仅在 N 或 α 变化时改变）。运行时，我们采样一个分段，然后在该分段内的转移中均匀采样。这特别适用于基于小批量的学习算法：选择 k 为小批量大小，并从每个分段中恰好采样一个转移——这是一种分层采样形式，具有平衡小批量的额外优势（总会有一个高幅度 δ 的转移、一个中等幅度的转移等）。比例变体不同，也支持基于“求和树”数据结构的高效实现（其中每个节点是其子节点的和，优先级作为叶节点），可以高效更新和采样。更多细节见附录 B.2.1。

items.en: The estimation of the expected value with stochastic updates relies on those updates corresponding to the same distribution as its expectation. Prioritized replay introduces bias because it changes this distribution in an uncontrolled fashion, and therefore changes the solution that the estimates will converge to (even if the policy and state distribution are fixed). We can correct this bias by using importance-sampling (IS) weights
items.zh: 使用随机更新对期望值的估计依赖于这些更新与期望值对应的相同分布。优先化重放引入了偏差，因为它以不受控的方式改变了这个分布，从而改变了估计将收敛到的解（即使策略和状态分布是固定的）。我们可以通过使用重要性采样（IS）权重来纠正这种偏差

items.en: that fully compensates for the non-uniform probabilities P​(i)𝑃𝑖P(i) if β=1𝛽1\beta=1. These weights can be folded into the Q-learning update by using wi​δisubscript𝑤𝑖subscript𝛿𝑖w_{i}\delta_{i} instead of δisubscript𝛿𝑖\delta_{i} (this is thus weighted IS, not ordinary IS, see e.g. Mahmood et al., 2014). For stability reasons, we always normalize weights by 1/maxi⁡wi1subscript𝑖subscript𝑤𝑖1/\max_{i}w_{i} so that they only scale the update downwards.
items.zh: 如果 β=1，则完全补偿非均匀概率 P(i)。这些权重可以通过使用 wiδi 代替 δi 来融入 Q 学习更新中（因此这是加权 IS，而非普通 IS，参见 Mahmood 等人，2014）。出于稳定性原因，我们总是将权重归一化为 1/max_i wi，以便它们仅向下缩放更新。

items.en: In typical reinforcement learning scenarios, the unbiased nature of the updates is most important near convergence at the end of training, as the process is highly non-stationary anyway, due to changing policies, state distributions and bootstrap targets; we hypothesize that a small bias can be ignored in this context (see also Figure 12 in the appendix for a case study of full IS correction on Atari). We therefore exploit the flexibility of annealing the amount of importance-sampling correction over time, by defining a schedule on the exponent β𝛽\beta that reaches 111 only at the end of learning. In practice, we linearly anneal β𝛽\beta from its initial value β0subscript𝛽0\beta_{0} to 111. Note that the choice of this hyperparameter interacts with choice of prioritization exponent α𝛼\alpha; increasing both simultaneously prioritizes sampling more aggressively at the same time as correcting for it more strongly.
items.zh: 在典型的强化学习场景中，更新的无偏性在训练结束接近收敛时最为重要，因为由于策略、状态分布和自举目标的变化，过程本身高度非平稳；我们假设在这种情况下可以忽略小的偏差（参见附录中关于 Atari 上完全 IS 校正的案例研究图 12）。因此，我们利用随时间退火重要性采样校正量的灵活性，通过定义指数 β 的调度，使其仅在学习结束时达到 1。在实践中，我们线性地将 β 从其初始值 β0 退火到 1。注意，该超参数的选择与优先化指数 α 的选择相互作用；同时增加两者会同时更积极地优先采样并更强地校正。

items.en: Importance sampling has another benefit when combined with prioritized replay in the context of non-linear function approximation (e.g. deep neural networks): here large steps can be very disruptive, because the first-order approximation of the gradient is only reliable locally, and have to be prevented with a smaller global step-size. In our approach instead, prioritization makes sure high-error transitions are seen many times, while the IS correction reduces the gradient magnitudes (and thus the effective step size in parameter space), and allowing the algorithm follow the curvature of highly non-linear optimization landscapes because the Taylor expansion is constantly re-approximated.
items.zh: 在非线性函数逼近（例如深度神经网络）的背景下，重要性采样与优先化重放结合还有另一个好处：这里大步长可能非常具有破坏性，因为梯度的线性近似仅在局部可靠，必须通过较小的全局步长来防止。在我们的方法中，优先化确保高误差转移被多次看到，而 IS 校正降低了梯度幅度（从而降低了参数空间中的有效步长），并允许算法跟随高度非线性优化景观的曲率，因为泰勒展开不断被重新近似。

items.en: We combine our prioritized replay algorithm into a full-scale reinforcement learning agent, based on the state-of-the-art Double DQN algorithm. Our principal modification is to replace the uniform random sampling used by Double DQN with our stochastic prioritization and importance sampling methods (see Algorithm 1).
items.zh: 我们将优先化重放算法与基于最先进的 Double DQN 算法的全规模强化学习智能体相结合。我们的主要修改是用随机优先化和重要性采样方法替换 Double DQN 使用的均匀随机采样（见算法 1）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Difference in normalized score (the gap between random and human is 100%percent100100\%) on 57 games with human starts, comparing Double DQN with and without prioritized replay (rank-based variant in red, proportional in blue), showing substantial improvements in most games. Exact scores are in Table 6. See also Figure 9 where regular DQN is the baseline.
items.capZh: 图 3：在 57 个具有人类起始状态的游戏上，比较使用和不使用优先化重放的 Double DQN（基于排名的变体为红色，比例为蓝色）的归一化分数差异（随机与人类之间的差距为 100%），显示在大多数游戏中都有显著改进。具体分数见表 6。另见图 9，其中常规 DQN 为基线。

items.en: With all these concepts in place, we now investigate to what extent replay with such prioritized sampling can improve performance in realistic problem domains. For this, we chose the collection of Atari benchmarks (Bellemare et al., 2012) with their end-to-end RL from vision setup, because they are popular and contain diverse sets of challenges, including delayed credit assignment, partial observability, and difficult function approximation (Mnih et al., 2015; van Hasselt et al., 2016). Our hypothesis is that prioritized replay is generally useful, so that it will make learning with experience replay more efficient without requiring careful problem-specific hyperparameter tuning.
items.zh: 有了所有这些概念，我们现在研究这种优先化采样的重放是否能在现实问题领域中提高性能。为此，我们选择了 Atari 基准测试集（Bellemare 等人，2012）及其端到端视觉强化学习设置，因为它们很流行且包含多样化的挑战，包括延迟信用分配、部分可观测性和困难的函数逼近（Mnih 等人，2015；van Hasselt 等人，2016）。我们的假设是优先化重放通常有用，因此它将使经验重放的学习更高效，而无需仔细调整特定问题的超参数。

items.en: We consider two baseline algorithms that use uniform experience replay, namely the version of the DQN algorithm from the Nature paper (Mnih et al., 2015), and its recent extension Double DQN (van Hasselt et al., 2016) that substantially improved the state-of-the-art by reducing the over-estimation bias with Double Q-learning (van Hasselt, 2010). Throughout this paper we use the tuned version of the Double DQN algorithm. For this paper, the most relevant component of these baselines is the replay mechanism: all experienced transitions are stored in a sliding window memory that retains the last 106superscript10610^{6} transitions. The algorithm processes minibatches of 32 transitions sampled uniformly from the memory. One minibatch update is done for each 4 new transitions entering the memory, so all experience is replayed 8 times on average. Rewards and TD-errors are clipped to fall within [−1,1]11[-1,1] for stability reasons.
items.zh: 我们考虑两种使用均匀经验重放的基线算法，即 Nature 论文中的 DQN 算法版本（Mnih 等人，2015）及其最近的扩展 Double DQN（van Hasselt 等人，2016），后者通过使用 Double Q 学习（van Hasselt，2010）减少过估计偏差，显著改进了最先进水平。在本文中，我们使用调优后的 Double DQN 算法版本。对于本文，这些基线最相关的组件是重放机制：所有经历过的转移都存储在一个滑动窗口内存中，该内存保留最后 10^6 个转移。该算法处理从内存中均匀采样的 32 个转移的小批量。每 4 个新转移进入内存时进行一次小批量更新，因此所有经验平均重放 8 次。出于稳定性原因，奖励和 TD 误差被裁剪到 [-1,1] 范围内。

items.en: We use the identical neural network architecture, learning algorithm, replay memory and evaluation setup as for the baselines (see Appendix B.2). The only difference is the mechanism for sampling transitions from the replay memory, with is now done according to Algorithm 1 instead of uniformly. We compare the baselines to both variants of prioritized replay (rank-based and proportional).
items.zh: 我们使用与基线相同的神经网络架构、学习算法、重放内存和评估设置（见附录 B.2）。唯一的区别是从重放内存中采样转移的机制，现在根据算法 1 而不是均匀采样。我们将基线与优先化重放的两种变体（基于排名和比例）进行比较。

items.en: Only a single hyperparameter adjustment was necessary compared to the baseline: Given that prioritized replay picks high-error transitions more often, the typical gradient magnitudes are larger, so we reduced the step-size η𝜂\eta by a factor 4 compared to the (Double) DQN setup. For the α𝛼\alpha and β0subscript𝛽0\beta_{0} hyperparameters that are introduced by prioritization, we did a coarse grid search (evaluated on a subset of 8 games), and found the sweet spot to be α=0.7𝛼0.7\alpha=0.7, β0=0.5subscript𝛽00.5\beta_{0}=0.5 for the rank-based variant and α=0.6𝛼0.6\alpha=0.6, β0=0.4subscript𝛽00.4\beta_{0}=0.4 for the proportional variant. These choices are trading off aggressiveness with robustness, but it is easy to revert to a behavior closer to the baseline by reducing α𝛼\alpha and/or increasing β𝛽\beta.
items.zh: 与基线相比，只需要调整一个超参数：鉴于优先化重放更频繁地选择高误差转移，典型的梯度幅度更大，因此我们将步长 η 比（Double）DQN 设置减少了 4 倍。对于优先化引入的 α 和 β0 超参数，我们进行了粗略的网格搜索（在 8 个游戏的子集上评估），发现基于排名变体的最佳点为 α=0.7，β0=0.5，比例变体为 α=0.6，β0=0.4。这些选择在激进性和鲁棒性之间进行了权衡，但通过降低 α 和/或增加 β 可以轻松恢复到更接近基线的行为。

items.en: We produce the results by running each variant with a single hyperparameter setting across all games, as was done for the baselines. Our main evaluation metric is the quality of the best policy, in terms of average score per episode, given start states sampled from human traces (as introduced in Nair et al., 2015 and used in van Hasselt et al., 2016, which requires more robustness and generalization as the agent cannot rely on repeating a single memorized trajectory). These results are summarized in Table 1 and Figure 3, but full results and raw scores can be found in Tables 7 and 6 in the Appendix. A secondary metric is the learning speed, which we summarize on Figure 4, with more detailed learning curves on Figures 7 and 8.
items.zh: 我们通过在所有游戏上使用单一超参数设置运行每个变体来产生结果，就像基线所做的那样。我们的主要评估指标是最佳策略的质量，以每集平均分数衡量，起始状态从人类轨迹中采样（如 Nair 等人，2015 年引入，van Hasselt 等人，2016 年使用，这需要更多的鲁棒性和泛化能力，因为智能体不能依赖重复单个记忆的轨迹）。这些结果总结在表 1 和图 3 中，但完整结果和原始分数可在附录的表 7 和表 6 中找到。次要指标是学习速度，我们在图 4 中总结，更详细的学习曲线见图 7 和图 8。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Summary plots of learning speed. Left: median over 57 games of the maximum baseline-normalized score achieved so far. The baseline-normalized score is calculated as in Equation 4 but using the maximum Double DQN score seen across training is used instead of the human score. The equivalence points are highlighted with dashed lines; those are the steps at which the curves reach 100%, (i.e., when the algorithm performs equivalently to Double DQN in terms of median over games). For rank-based and proportional prioritization these are at 47% and 38% of total training time. Right: Similar to the left, but using the mean instead of maximum, which captures cumulative performance rather than peak performance. Here rank-based and proportional prioritization reach the equivalence points at 41% and 43% of total training time, respectively. For the detailed learning curves that these plots summarize, see Figure 7.
items.capZh: 图 4：学习速度的汇总图。左图：57 个游戏的中位数，即迄今为止达到的最大基线归一化分数。基线归一化分数按公式 4 计算，但使用训练中看到的 Double DQN 最大分数代替人类分数。等价点用虚线突出显示；这些是曲线达到 100% 的步骤（即算法在游戏间中位数上表现与 Double DQN 相当）。对于基于排名和比例优先化，这些点分别位于总训练时间的 47% 和 38%。右图：与左图类似，但使用均值而非最大值，这捕获了累积性能而非峰值性能。这里基于排名和比例优先化分别达到总训练时间的 41% 和 43% 的等价点。有关这些图总结的详细学习曲线，见图 7。

items.en: We find that adding prioritized replay to DQN leads to a substantial improvement in score on 41 out of 49 games (compare columns 2 and 3 of Table 6 or Figure 9 in the appendix), with the median normalized performance across 49 games increasing from 48%percent4848\% to 106%percent106106\%. Furthermore, we find that the boost from prioritized experience replay is complementary to the one from introducing Double Q-learning into DQN: performance increases another notch, leading to the current state-of-the-art on the Atari benchmark (see Figure 3). Compared to Double DQN, the median performance across 57 games increased from 111%percent111111\% to 128%percent128128\%, and the mean performance from 418%percent418418\% to 551%percent551551\% bringing additional games such as River Raid, Seaquest and Surround to a human level for the first time, and making large jumps on others (e.g. Gopher, James Bond 007 or Space Invaders). Note that mean performance is not a very reliable metric because a single game (Video Pinball) has a dominant contribution. Prioritizing replay gives a performance boost on almost all games, and on aggregate, learning is twice as fast (see Figures 4 and 8). The learning curves on Figure 7 illustrate that while the two variants of prioritization usually lead to similar results, there are games where one of them remains close to the Double DQN baseline while the other one leads to a big boost, for example Double Dunk or Surround for the rank-based variant, and Alien, Asterix, Enduro, Phoenix or Space Invaders for the proportional variant. Another observation from the learning curves is that compared to the uniform baseline, prioritization is effective at reducing the delay until performance gets off the ground in games that otherwise suffer from such a delay, such as Battlezone, Zaxxon or Frostbite.
items.zh: 我们发现，将优先化重放添加到 DQN 中导致 49 个游戏中有 41 个的分数显著提高（比较表 6 或附录图 9 的第 2 列和第 3 列），49 个游戏的中位数归一化性能从 48% 增加到 106%。此外，我们发现优先化经验重放的提升与将 Double Q 学习引入 DQN 的提升是互补的：性能进一步提高，达到了 Atari 基准测试的当前最先进水平（见图 3）。与 Double DQN 相比，57 个游戏的中位数性能从 111% 增加到 128%，平均性能从 418% 增加到 551%，首次将 River Raid、Seaquest 和 Surround 等游戏提升到人类水平，并在其他游戏（如 Gopher、James Bond 007 或 Space Invaders）上取得了巨大飞跃。注意，平均性能不是一个非常可靠的指标，因为单个游戏（Video Pinball）贡献占主导。优先化重放几乎在所有游戏上都带来了性能提升，并且总体上学习速度翻倍（见图 4 和图 8）。图 7 的学习曲线表明，虽然两种优先化变体通常导致相似的结果，但有些游戏中一种变体保持接近 Double DQN 基线，而另一种则带来巨大提升，例如基于排名变体的 Double Dunk 或 Surround，以及比例变体的 Alien、Asterix、Enduro、Phoenix 或 Space Invaders。从学习曲线中观察到的另一个现象是，与均匀基线相比，优先化在那些原本存在延迟的游戏（如 Battlezone、Zaxxon 或 Frostbite）中有效减少了性能起步的延迟。

items.en: In the head-to-head comparison between rank-based prioritization and proportional prioritization, we expected the rank-based variant to be more robust because it is not affected by outliers nor error magnitudes. Furthermore, its heavy-tail property also guarantees that samples will be diverse, and the stratified sampling from partitions of different errors will keep the total minibatch gradient at a stable magnitude throughout training. On the other hand, the ranks make the algorithm blind to the relative error scales, which could incur a performance drop when there is structure in the distribution of errors to be exploited, such as in sparse reward scenarios. Perhaps surprisingly, both variants perform similarly in practice; we suspect this is due to the heavy use of clipping (of rewards and TD-errors) in the DQN algorithm, which removes outliers. Monitoring the distribution of TD-errors as a function of time for a number of games (see Figure 10 in the appendix), and found that it becomes close to a heavy-tailed distribution as learning progresses, while still differing substantially across games; this empirically validates the form of Equation 1. Figure 11, in the appendix, shows how this distribution interacts with Equation 1 to produce the effective replay probabilities.
items.zh: 在基于排名优先化和比例优先化的直接比较中，我们预期基于排名的变体更鲁棒，因为它不受异常值或误差幅度的影响。此外，其重尾特性也保证了样本的多样性，并且来自不同误差分区的分层采样将使整个小批量梯度在训练过程中保持稳定幅度。另一方面，排名使算法对相对误差尺度不敏感，当误差分布中存在可利用的结构时（例如在稀疏奖励场景中），这可能导致性能下降。也许令人惊讶的是，两种变体在实践中表现相似；我们怀疑这是由于 DQN 算法中大量使用裁剪（奖励和 TD 误差），这消除了异常值。监测多个游戏中 TD 误差随时间变化的分布（见附录图 10），发现随着学习进行，它变得接近重尾分布，同时在不同游戏间仍有显著差异；这经验验证了公式 1 的形式。附录中的图 11 显示了该分布如何与公式 1 相互作用以产生有效的重放概率。

items.en: While doing this analysis, we stumbled upon another phenomenon (obvious in retrospect), namely that some fraction of the visited transitions are never replayed before they drop out of the sliding window memory, and many more are replayed for the first time only long after they are encountered. Also, uniform sampling is implicitly biased toward out-of-date transitions that were generated by a policy that has typically seen hundreds of thousands of updates since. Prioritized replay with its bonus for unseen transitions directly corrects the first of these issues, and also tends to help with the second one, as more recent transitions tend to have larger error – this is because old transitions will have had more opportunities to have them corrected, and because novel data tends to be less well predicted by the value function.
items.zh: 在进行此分析时，我们偶然发现了另一个现象（事后看来很明显），即一些访问过的转移在从滑动窗口内存中丢弃之前从未被重放，而更多的转移在遇到后很久才第一次被重放。此外，均匀采样隐式偏向于由已经经历了数十万次更新的策略生成的过时转移。优先化重放及其对未见转移的奖励直接纠正了第一个问题，并且也有助于第二个问题，因为较新的转移往往有更大的误差——这是因为旧转移有更多机会被纠正，并且新数据往往被价值函数预测得较差。

items.en: We hypothesize that deep neural networks interact with prioritized replay in another interesting way. When we distinguish learning the value given a representation (i.e., the top layers) from learning an improved representation (i.e., the bottom layers), then transitions for which the representation is good will quickly reduce their error and then be replayed much less, increasing the learning focus on others where the representation is poor, thus putting more resources into distinguishing aliased states – if the observations and network capacity allow for it.
items.zh: 我们假设深度神经网络以另一种有趣的方式与优先化重放交互。当我们将给定表示的学习价值（即顶层）与学习改进表示（即底层）区分开来时，那么表示良好的转移将快速减少其误差，然后被重放得更少，从而将学习重点放在表示较差的转移上，从而将更多资源用于区分混淆状态——如果观测和网络容量允许的话。

items.en: Prioritized Supervised Learning: The analogous approach to prioritized replay in the context of supervised learning is to sample non-uniformly from the dataset, each sample using a priority based on its last-seen error. This can help focus the learning on those samples that can still be learned from, devoting additional resources to the (hard) boundary cases, somewhat similarly to boosting (Galar et al., 2012). Furthermore, if the dataset is imbalanced, we hypothesize that samples from the rare classes will be sampled disproportionately often, because their errors shrink less fast, and the chosen samples from the common classes will be those nearest to the decision boundaries, leading to an effect similar to hard negative mining (Felzenszwalb et al., 2008). To check whether these intuitions hold, we conducted a preliminary experiment on a class-imbalanced variant of the classical MNIST digit classification problem (LeCun et al., 1998), where we removed 99%percent9999\% of the samples for digits 0,1,2,3,4012340,1,2,3,4 in the training set, while leaving the test/validation sets untouched (i.e., those retain class balance). We compare two scenarios: in the informed case, we reweight the errors of the impoverished classes artificially (by a factor 100100100), in the uninformed scenario, we provide no hint that the test distribution will differ from the training distribution. See Appendix B.3 for the details of the convolutional neural network training setup. Prioritized sampling (uninformed, with α=1𝛼1\alpha=1, β=0𝛽0\beta=0) outperforms the uninformed uniform baseline, and approaches the performance of the informed uniform baseline in terms of generalization (see Figure 5); again, prioritized training is also faster in terms of learning speed.
items.zh: 优先化监督学习：在监督学习背景下，与优先化重放类似的方法是从数据集中非均匀采样，每个样本使用基于其上次所见误差的优先级。这有助于将学习集中在那些仍可学习的样本上，将额外资源用于（困难的）边界情况，类似于提升（Galar 等人，2012）。此外，如果数据集不平衡，我们假设来自稀有类别的样本将被不成比例地频繁采样，因为它们的误差减少较慢，而来自常见类别的选定样本将是那些最接近决策边界的样本，从而产生类似于难负例挖掘的效果（Felzenszwalb 等人，2008）。为了检查这些直觉是否成立，我们在经典 MNIST 数字分类问题（LeCun 等人，1998）的类别不平衡变体上进行了初步实验，其中我们移除了训练集中数字 0,1,2,3,4 的 99% 样本，同时保持测试/验证集不变（即它们保持类别平衡）。我们比较了两种情况：在知情情况下，我们人为地重新加权贫困类别的误差（乘以因子 100），在不知情情况下，我们不提供测试分布将与训练分布不同的提示。卷积神经网络训练设置的细节见附录 B.3。优先化采样（不知情，α=1，β=0）在泛化方面优于不知情的均匀基线，并接近知情均匀基线的性能（见图 5）；同样，优先化训练在学习速度上也更快。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Classification errors as a function of supervised learning updates on severely class-imbalanced MNIST. Prioritized sampling improves performance, leading to comparable errors on the test set, and approaching the imbalance-informed performance (median of 3 random initializations). Left: Number of misclassified test set samples. Right: Test set loss, highlighting overfitting.
items.capZh: 图5：在严重类别不平衡的MNIST数据集上，分类误差随监督学习更新的变化。优先采样提高了性能，使测试集上的误差相当，并接近不平衡感知的性能（3次随机初始化的中位数）。左图：测试集误分类样本数。右图：测试集损失，突出过拟合。

items.en: Off-policy Replay: Two standard approaches to off-policy RL are rejection sampling and using importance sampling ratios ρ𝜌\rho to correct for how likely a transition would have been on-policy. Our approach contains analogues to both these approaches, the replay probability P𝑃P and the IS-correction w𝑤w. It appears therefore natural to apply it to off-policy RL, if transitions are available in a replay memory. In particular, we recover weighted IS with w=ρ𝑤𝜌w=\rho, α=0𝛼0\alpha=0, β=1𝛽1\beta=1 and rejection sampling with p=min⁡(1;ρ)𝑝1𝜌p=\min(1;\rho), α=1𝛼1\alpha=1, β=0𝛽0\beta=0, in the proportional variant. Our experiments indicate that intermediate variants, possibly with annealing or ranking, could be more useful in practice – especially when IS ratios introduce high variance, i.e., when the policy of interest differs substantially from the behavior policy in some states. Of course, off-policy correction is complementary to our prioritization based on expected learning progress, and the same framework can be used for a hybrid prioritization by defining p=ρ⋅|δ|𝑝⋅𝜌𝛿p=\rho\cdot|\delta|, or some other sensible trade-off based on both ρ𝜌\rho and δ𝛿\delta.
items.zh: 离策略回放：离策略强化学习的两种标准方法是拒绝采样和使用重要性采样比率ρ来校正转移在策略下的可能性。我们的方法包含了这两种方法的类似物，即回放概率P和IS校正w。因此，如果转移在回放记忆中可用，将其应用于离策略强化学习似乎很自然。特别地，我们恢复了加权IS（w=ρ，α=0，β=1）和拒绝采样（p=min(1;ρ)，α=1，β=0）的比例变体。我们的实验表明，中间变体（可能带有退火或排序）在实践中可能更有用——特别是当IS比率引入高方差时，即当目标策略与行为策略在某些状态上差异很大时。当然，离策略校正与基于预期学习进度的优先级是互补的，并且相同的框架可用于混合优先级，通过定义p=ρ·|δ|，或基于ρ和δ的其他合理权衡。

items.en: Feedback for Exploration: An interesting side-effect of prioritized replay is that the total number Misubscript𝑀𝑖M_{i} that a transition will end up being replayed varies widely, and this gives a rough indication of how useful it was to the agent. This potentially valuable signal can be fed back to the exploration strategy that generates the transitions. For example, we could sample exploration hyperparameters (such as the fraction of random actions ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, the Boltzmann temperature, or the amount of of intrinsic reward to mix in) from a parametrized distribution at the beginning of each episode, monitor the usefulness of the experience via Misubscript𝑀𝑖M_{i}, and update the distribution toward generating more useful experience. Or, in a parallel system like the Gorila agent (Nair et al., 2015), it could guide resource allocation between a collection of concurrent but heterogeneous ‘actors’, each with different exploration hyperparameters.
items.zh: 探索反馈：优先回放的一个有趣副作用是，一个转移最终被回放的总次数Mi变化很大，这粗略指示了它对智能体的有用程度。这个潜在有价值的信号可以反馈给生成转移的探索策略。例如，我们可以在每个情节开始时从参数化分布中采样探索超参数（如随机动作的比例ε、玻尔兹曼温度或混合的内在奖励量），通过Mi监控经验的有用性，并更新分布以生成更有用的经验。或者，在像Gorila智能体（Nair等人，2015）这样的并行系统中，它可以指导一组并发但异构的“行动者”之间的资源分配，每个行动者具有不同的探索超参数。

items.en: Prioritized Memories: Considerations that help determine which transitions to replay are likely to also be relevant for determining which memories to store and when to erase them (e.g. when it becomes likely that they will never be replayed anymore). An explicit control over which memories to keep or erase can help reduce the required total memory size, because it reduces redundancy (frequently visited transitions will have low error, so many of them will be dropped), while automatically adjusting for what has been learned already (dropping many of the ‘easy’ transitions) and biasing the contents of the memory to where the errors remain high. This is a non-trivial aspect, because memory requirements for DQN are currently dominated by the size of the replay memory, no longer by the size of the neural network. Erasing is a more final decision than reducing the replay probability, thus an even stronger emphasis of diversity may be necessary, for example by tracking the age of each transitions and using it to modulate the priority in such a way as to preserve sufficient old experience to prevent cycles (related to ‘hall of fame’ ideas in multi-agent literature, Rosin & Belew, 1997). The priority mechanism is also flexible enough to permit integrating experience from other sources, such as from a planner or from human expert trajectories (Guo et al., 2014), since knowing the source can be used to modulate each transition’s priority, e.g. in such a way as to preserve a sufficient fraction of external experience in memory.
items.zh: 优先记忆：有助于确定哪些转移应回放的考虑因素，也可能与确定哪些记忆应存储以及何时擦除它们（例如，当它们可能永远不会再被回放时）相关。对保留或擦除哪些记忆的显式控制有助于减少所需的总记忆大小，因为它减少了冗余（频繁访问的转移误差低，因此许多将被丢弃），同时自动调整已学内容（丢弃许多“简单”转移），并将记忆内容偏向误差仍然较高的区域。这是一个重要的方面，因为目前DQN的记忆需求主要由回放记忆的大小决定，而不再是神经网络的大小。擦除比降低回放概率更最终，因此可能需要更强调多样性，例如通过跟踪每个转移的年龄并以此调节优先级，以保留足够的旧经验来防止循环（与多智能体文献中的“名人堂”思想相关，Rosin & Belew, 1997）。优先级机制也足够灵活，允许整合来自其他来源的经验，例如来自规划器或人类专家轨迹（Guo等人，2014），因为知道来源可用于调节每个转移的优先级，例如以保留足够比例的外部经验在记忆中。

items.en: This paper introduced prioritized replay, a method that can make learning from experience replay more efficient. We studied a couple of variants, devised implementations that scale to large replay memories, and found that prioritized replay speeds up learning by a factor 2 and leads to a new state-of-the-art of performance on the Atari benchmark. We laid out further variants and extensions that hold promise, namely for class-imbalanced supervised learning.
items.zh: 本文介绍了优先回放，一种可以使从经验回放中学习更高效的方法。我们研究了几种变体，设计了可扩展到大型回放记忆的实现，并发现优先回放将学习速度提高了2倍，并在Atari基准上达到了新的最先进性能。我们提出了有前景的进一步变体和扩展，例如用于类别不平衡的监督学习。

items.en: We thank our Deepmind colleagues, in particular Hado van Hasselt, Joseph Modayil, Nicolas Heess, Marc Bellemare, Razvan Pascanu, Dharshan Kumaran, Daan Wierstra, Arthur Guez, Charles Blundell, Alex Pritzel, Alex Graves, Balaji Lakshminarayanan, Ziyu Wang, Nando de Freitas, Remi Munos and Geoff Hinton for insightful discussions and feedback.
items.zh: 我们感谢DeepMind的同事，特别是Hado van Hasselt、Joseph Modayil、Nicolas Heess、Marc Bellemare、Razvan Pascanu、Dharshan Kumaran、Daan Wierstra、Arthur Guez、Charles Blundell、Alex Pritzel、Alex Graves、Balaji Lakshminarayanan、Ziyu Wang、Nando de Freitas、Remi Munos和Geoff Hinton，感谢他们的深刻讨论和反馈。
